purpose: Expose the authenticated wishlist value through existing catalog/detail surfaces and one focused wishlist page.
success_outcome: Buyers can discover, add, view, and remove product favorites with truthful auth/pending/error states and no guest persistence.
anti_goals: Do not add variant favorites, sharing, notes, folders, or recommendations.

success_checks: Catalog/detail controls use opaque product ID and accessible states.
Guest routes to login with no persisted intent; valid current customer remains enabled during merge_blocked.
Wishlist page renders only exact minimal projection across loading/empty/products/error/remove/session-expired.
evidence_required: Guest no-intent and exact projection assertions.

stop_conditions: Existing product surfaces do not expose opaque product ID from TASK-036.
Guest login routing would require persisted favorite intent.
UI requires fields outside exact WishlistProductProjection.
Wishlist UI would be disabled solely because cart merge is blocked.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify TASK-040 before closure; T2 feature completion later requires feature-level red verification.
